heading: Staging and Production Environments
body:
Consider running the following  procedure twice. Perform a partial migration
that stops at the Perform the Cutover step *first*. This creates
an up-to-date Atlas-backed staging cluster to test application behavior
and performance using the latest [driver version](driver-compatibility-reference)
that supports the MongoDB version of the Atlas cluster.

After you test your application, run the full migration procedure
using a separate Atlas cluster to create your Atlas-backed
production environment.
